title: Minky Easy Fit Ironing board cover + Ironing Board Clips Bundle, 122 x 38 cm
features: Fits large ironing boards up to 122 x 38cm
Easy to fit - strong elasticated cover
3 elastic ironing board cover clips hold your cover securely in place
Thick felt backing provides a smoother ironing surface
description: From the manufacturer Minky Easy Fit with clips Minky Easy Fit 122 x 38cm Ironing Board Cover & Clips Bundle is the perfect solution to a super smooth ironing surface. The felt backed double layer cover provides a crease free ironing surface allowing your iron to run smoothly across all fabrics. This cover fits large boards up to 122 x 38cm. The Ironing Board Cover Clips have elasticated strips to hold the cover securely in place. Simply attach them to either side of the cover on the underside of the ironing board for a wrinkle free ironing surface. The plastic clips have a firm but gentle grip preventing marks from being left on your ironing board cover while the elastic strap allows maximum security and fits most standard size ironing boards. Minky ironing board covers are manufactured in the UK to a high quality production standard.
